channel.title: Clam Bake Santa
channel.description: Daily haikus celebrating holidays and birthdays.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-14
item.description: Crunchy, sweet delight, Golden brown in warm sunshine, Nuts dance in delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-13
item.description: Golden peaches warm, Cinnamon swirls fill the air, Sweet joy in each bite.
